message:
Running command: # Log frozen since 11:45 (7 min). OpenROAD at 99.9% CPU doing repair analysis.
# This can take 30-120+ minutes for a high-utilization design with 14100 violations.
# Set a long-running background monitor to track completion.
# Continue with 30-min poll intervals.

WRAPPER_RUN="/workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu/openlane/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper/runs/wrapper_run"
LOG="/tmp/librelane_final.log"
LR_PID=363476

for i in $(seq 1 48); do
  sleep 1800  # 30 min

  LR_ALIVE=$(ps -p $LR_PID -o pid --no-headers 2>/dev/null | xargs)
  ELAPSED=$(ps -p $LR_PID -o etime --no-headers 2>/dev/null | xargs)
  STEP=$(ls -t "$WRAPPER_RUN/" 2>/dev/null | grep "^[0-9]" | head -1)
  STEP_COUNT=$(ls "$WRAPPER_RUN/" 2>/dev/null | grep -c "^[0-9]" || echo 0)
  LOG_BYTES=$(stat -c%s "$LOG" 2>/dev/null || echo 0)
  LOG_MTIME=$(stat -c%y "$LOG" 2>/dev/null | cut -c12-19)
  LOG_TAIL=$(tail -1 "$LOG" 2>/dev/null | xargs | cut -c1-80)
  FINAL_GDS=$(ls "$WRAPPER_RUN/final/gds/"*.gds 2>/dev/null | head -1)
  FINAL_LEF=$(ls "$WRAPPER_RUN/final/lef/"*.lef 2>/dev/null | head -1)
  OR_MEM=$(ps aux | grep "openroad\b" | grep -v bash | grep -v grep | awk '{print $4}' | head -1)

  echo "[$(date '+%H:%M:%S')] LR=${LR_ALIVE:-DONE}(${ELAPSED}) step=$STEP (#${STEP_COUNT}) log=$(numfmt --to=iec $LOG_BYTES 2>/dev/null) mtime=$LOG_MTIME OR=${OR_MEM}%mem"
  echo "  $LOG_TAIL"
  [ -n "$FINAL_GDS" ] && echo "  *** GDS: $FINAL_GDS ***"
  [ -n "$FINAL_LEF" ] && echo "  *** LEF: $FINAL_LEF ***"
  echo ""

  if [ -z "$LR_ALIVE" ]; then
    echo "=== LibreLane EXITED ==="
    ls -lt "$WRAPPER_RUN/" | head -60
    find "$WRAPPER_RUN/final/" 2>/dev/null | sort | head -40
    tail -80 "$LOG"
    break
  fi
done

# This can take 30-120+ minutes for a high-utilization design with 14100 violations.
# Set a long-running background monitor to track completion.
# Continue with 30-min poll intervals.

WRAPPER_RUN="/workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu/openlane/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper/runs/wrapper_run"
LOG="/tmp/librelane_final.log"
LR_PID=363476

for i in $(seq 1 48); do
  sleep 1800  # 30 min

  LR_ALIVE=$(ps -p $LR_PID -o pid --no-headers 2>/dev/null | xargs)
  ELAPSED=$(ps -p $LR_PID -o etime --no-headers 2>/dev/null | xargs)
  STEP=$(ls -t "$WRAPPER_RUN/" 2>/dev/null | grep "^[0-9]" | head -1)
  STEP_COUNT=$(ls "$WRAPPER_RUN/" 2>/dev/null | grep -c "^[0-9]" || echo 0)
  LOG_BYTES=$(stat -c%s "$LOG" 2>/dev/null || echo 0)
  LOG_MTIME=$(stat -c%y "$LOG" 2>/dev/null | cut -c12-19)
  LOG_TAIL=$(tail -1 "$LOG" 2>/dev/null | xargs | cut -c1-80)
  FINAL_GDS=$(ls "$WRAPPER_RUN/final/gds/"*.gds 2>/dev/null | head -1)
  FINAL_LEF=$(ls "$WRAPPER_RUN/final/lef/"*.lef 2>/dev/null | head -1)
  OR_MEM=$(ps aux | grep "openroad\b" | grep -v bash | grep -v grep | awk '{print $4}' | head -1)

  echo "[$(date '+%H:%M:%S')] LR=${LR_ALIVE:-DONE}(${ELAPSED}) step=$STEP (#${STEP_COUNT}) log=$(numfmt --to=iec $LOG_BYTES 2>/dev/null) mtime=$LOG_MTIME OR=${OR_MEM}%mem"
  echo "  $LOG_TAIL"
  [ -n "$FINAL_GDS" ] && echo "  *** GDS: $FINAL_GDS ***"
  [ -n "$FINAL_LEF" ] && echo "  *** LEF: $FINAL_LEF ***"
  echo ""

  if [ -z "$LR_ALIVE" ]; then
    echo "=== LibreLane EXITED ==="
    ls -lt "$WRAPPER_RUN/" | head -60
    find "$WRAPPER_RUN/final/" 2>/dev/null | sort | head -40
    tail -80 "$LOG"
    break
  fi
done" timed out

cat > /tmp/pnr_watch.sh << 'EOF'
#!/bin/bash

LOG="/tmp/librelane_final.log"
LR_PID=363476
OUT="/tmp/pnr_watch.log"
echo "Watch started $(date)" > "$OUT"
while kill -0 $LR_PID 2>/dev/null; do
  sleep 300
  STEP=$(ls -t "$WRAPPER_RUN/" 2>/dev/null | grep "^[0-9]" | head -1)
  OR_CPU=$(ps aux | grep "openroad\b" | grep -v bash | grep -v grep | awk '{print $3}' | head -1)
  OR_MEM=$(ps aux | grep "openroad\b" | grep -v bash | grep -v grep | awk '{print $4}' | head -1)
  LOG_MTIME=$(stat -c%y "$LOG" 2>/dev/null | cut -c12-19)
  ELAPSED=$(ps -p $LR_PID -o etime --no-headers 2>/dev/null | xargs)
  FINAL_GDS=$(ls "$WRAPPER_RUN/final/gds/"*.gds 2>/dev/null | head -1)
  echo "[$(date '+%H:%M:%S')] LR_alive(${ELAPSED}) step=$STEP OR_cpu=${OR_CPU}% OR_mem=${OR_MEM}% log_mtime=${LOG_MTIME}" >> "$OUT"

echo "LR_DONE at $(date)" >> "$OUT"
tail -30 "$LOG" >> "$OUT"
EOF

sleep 7200
